metadata.description: LSP-based code analysis skills for AI agents — definition trees, reference lookup, call chain analysis. Works offline with regex, scales up with real LSP servers.

plugins.name: lsprag
plugins.description: Semantic code analysis via LSP: build definition trees, find callers, analyze call chains. No VS Code required. Works offline (regex) or with real LSP servers (gopls, tsserver, pylsp).

plugins.name: lsprag-deep-think
plugins.description: High-effort BFS code understanding: recursively retrieve source and dependencies for a symbol and all its transitive dependencies. Use before writing tests or refactoring complex functions.
